title: DescribeConnectorEntityRequest
description: DescribeConnectorEntityRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorEntityName.description: The entity name for that connector.

connectorType.description: The type of connector application, such as Salesforce, Marketo, and so on.

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile. The name is unique for each ConnectorProfile in the AWS account.

apiVersion.description: The version of the API that's used by the connector.
